prompt: A realistic indoor portrait photo of a slim young East Asian woman with long black softly wavy hair, seated on a smooth concrete bench in a minimalist cafe interior. She is facing the camera with a shy, gentle posture, shoulders slightly angled, hands loosely clasped together on her lap, and legs crossed at the ankles. She wears a fitted white cropped T-shirt with small centered Japanese text reading "午後" and a dark high-waisted denim mini skirt. Natural window light from the left side creates soft, diffused shadows and a calm, muted atmosphere. The background shows a modern warm-toned cafe with 1 window frame on the upper left, 1 wooden counter on the right, 1 tall black stool, 1 woven basket on the floor, and a subtle shelf with glass bottles in soft focus. Shot vertically, medium full-body framing, eye-level perspective, shallow depth of field, understated editorial fashion photography, neutral colors, soft skin tones, quiet candid mood, highly realistic.
